title: mosla japonica
intro: Mosla japonica, also known as Japanese citrus mint or Japanese peppermint, is a perennial herb in the mint family that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relax muscles, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Mosla japonica include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and reduce stress and anxiety. Mosla japonica is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water, and it can also be added to herbal remedies and supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
